title: Active Remcos / AgentTesla C2 tied to Aeza staging
summary: A Windows C2 server running Remcos, AgentTesla and a "Taskun" panel, fed by RFQ/quotation malspam. A UAC-bypass ChromeElevator loader staged on Aeza beacons here, linking the Aeza open-directory staging dir to an active info-stealer operation.
detail: C2 server confirmed hosting Remcos, AgentTesla and a "Taskun" panel across eight samples (2023-2025), delivered via REQUEST FOR QUOTATION / RFQ malspam lures. A ChromeElevator UAC-bypass loader (agentus.exe, masquerading as SecurityHealthService.exe, ~17/VT) pulled from an Aeza open directory beacons to this IP. The host (AS399486, registered "12651980 CANADA INC." / Virtuo Networks France) exposes RDP/WinRM/SMB (3389/5985/445). Commodity but active — it concretely links recent Aeza payload-staging to a running info-stealer operation.
